title: Calicut University Hall Ticket 2026 - Overview

detail.title: Calicut University Hall Ticket 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: Calicut University hall ticket 2026 released for VI & VIII Sem B.Tech, B.PEd, Integrated PG and SDE‑CBCSS UG April 2026 supplementary/improvement exams. Download UOC hall ticket at cupbonline.uoc.ac.in or student.uoc.ac.in using Register Number and Date of Birth, and check exam date, exam centre and instructions here.

content.text: The University of Calicut has activated the hall ticket download portal for various April 2026 supplementary/improvement examinations, including B.Tech, B.PEd, Integrated PG and SDE‑CBCSS UG courses. Hall tickets are being made available through the CuPbOnline hall ticket portal and the student login page for eligible candidates.

As per the latest hall ticket list, students can now download admit cards for VI Semester B.Tech Supplementary/Improvement April 2026, First Semester B.PEd Sup/Imp 11/2025, VIII Semester B.Tech Supplementary/ Improvement November 2025, and IV Semester SDE‑CBCSS UG April 2026, among others. Candidates must carry a printed hall ticket and valid ID to be allowed into the examination hall.

rows: B.Tech (VI & VIII Sem Supplementary/Improvement), B.PEd (I Sem Sup/Imp), Integrated PG (II Sem Sup/Imp), SDE-CBCSS UG IV Sem (BA/BSc/BA Afsal-Ul-Ulama/BA Multimedia) - April 2026 Session
Semester-end supplementary/improvement examinations for regular and distance education students of Calicut University
2 May 2026 to 7 May 2026 (depending on the specific course/semester)
April 2026 and related backlog sessions (e.g., November 2025/November 2024 B.Tech supplementary exams)
Offline, Pen-and-Paper university examinations conducted at designated Calicut University exam centres
Register Number and Date of Birth (DD/MM/YYYY)

sections.heading: Calicut University Hall Ticket 2026 - Direct Link

content.text: Calicut University has activated the direct links to download hall tickets for B.Tech, B.PEd, Integrated PG, and SDE-CBCSS UG supplementary/ improvement examinations scheduled for April 2026 and related sessions. Students can view and download their admit cards instantly through the official CuPb Online and student login portal using the links provided below.

rows: VI Semester B.Tech Supplementary/ Improvement Examination (2019 Scheme- 2020 to 2022 Admissions) April 2026
First Semester B.PEd Sup/Imp Examination 11/2025 (2023, 2024 Admissions)
VIII Semester B.Tech Supplementary/Improvement Examinations (2019 Scheme, 2021 Admission) November 2025
VIII Semester B.Tech Supplementary Examinations (2019 Scheme, 2020 Admission) April 2025
VIII Semester B.Tech Supplementary Examinations (2019 Scheme, 2019 Admission) November 2024
Second Semester Integrated (INTEGRATED PG) Supplementary/Improvement Examination April 2026(2021 to 2024 Admns)
IV Semester SDE(CDOE)-CBCSS -UG B.A/B.Sc/B.A Afsal-Ulama/B.A Multimedia Supplementary/Improvement Examination - April 2026 (2020 -2023 Admn.Only)

sections.heading: How to Download Calicut University Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: Students can download their hall ticket for the relevant exam using the official portals as follows:

items: Visit the Calicut University hall ticket portal: http://www.cupbonline.uoc.ac.in/CuPbOnline/online_portal/halltickets.php for the list of available hall tickets.
http://www.cupbonline.uoc.ac.in/CuPbOnline/online_portal/halltickets.php for the list of available hall tickets.
On the hall ticket list page, click on the relevant exam link (for example, VI Semester B.Tech Supplementary/Improvement Examination April 2026).
You will be redirected to the student guest login page at https://student.uoc.ac.in/guestlogin.
Enter your Register Number and Date of Birth, then click Login or Submit.
Your Calicut University Hall Ticket 2026 for the selected exam/semester will be displayed on the screen.
Check your name, register number, exam centre and timetable printed on the hall ticket, then download and take 2-3 printouts.

content.text: For CUCAT/entrance tests, students use the separate admission.uoc.ac.in portal with CAP ID and password, but for these regular/supplementary exams the CuPbOnline/student portal is used.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on Calicut University Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: The Calicut University admit card generally contains the following details, which students must verify carefully:

items: Candidate’s name and photograph
Register Number / Roll Number
Course and programme (e.g., B.Tech/B.PEd/Integrated PG/SDE‑CBCSS UG)
Semester and scheme (2019 Scheme, etc.)
Exam name and session (e.g., April 2026 Supplementary/Improvement, November 2025)
Exam centre name, code and full address
Subject‑wise paper codes and titles (may be given in attached timetable)
Exam date(s) and session/shift timing
Important instructions and examination rules

content.text: Any discrepancy (wrong name, register number, course/semester or exam centre) should be reported immediately to the college/department or Pareeksha Bhavan before the exam.

sections.heading: Documents Required with Calicut University Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: On the day of the Calicut University semester/supplementary examinations 2026, students must carry:

items: A printed copy of the Calicut University Hall Ticket 2026 for the relevant course and semester (clear A4‑size printout, preferably colour or good‑quality black and white).

One original valid photo ID proof, such as: College ID card issued by the University/college Aadhaar Card PAN Card Passport Driving Licence Voter ID Any other government‑issued ID accepted by the exam centre/college.
College ID card issued by the University/college
Aadhaar Card
PAN Card
Passport
Driving Licence
Voter ID
Any other government‑issued ID accepted by the exam centre/college.

Additional documents, if mentioned in the hall ticket/university instructions (for example, disability/medical certificate for students with special needs, or any permission letter issued by Pareeksha Bhavan where applicable).

content.text: Entry to the examination hall will not be permitted without the printed Calicut University hall ticket and a valid photo ID, as per university examination rules.

sections.heading: Exam‑Day Instructions for Calicut University Exams 2026

content.text: To ensure smooth conduct of the Calicut University examinations:

items: Reach the exam centre well before the reporting time printed on the hall ticket so that verification and seating can be completed; late entry after the scheduled time may not be allowed.
Carry a printed Calicut University hall ticket 2026 and a valid photo ID (college ID or government ID) along with permitted stationery (blue/black pens, pencils, etc.) as per university rules.
Do not carry mobile phones, smart watches, calculators (if not allowed), Bluetooth devices, notes, books or any electronic gadgets inside the exam hall; such items are strictly prohibited.
Follow all instructions printed on the hall ticket and those announced by the invigilators; any unfair means can lead to cancellation of the exam and other disciplinary action.
Keep your hall ticket safely even after the exam for future reference and result verification.
